text.title: semantic-field-naming Worked Examples
text.summary: Five end-to-end rename cases drawn from production benchmarks and real pipelines.

example.title: Instructor 2024-09: 90-point accuracy swing from one rename
example.delta: Multiple-choice benchmark accuracy: 4.5% → 95%. Same prompt, same model, same options.
example.reason: The token `answer` has orders of magnitude more occurrences than `final_choice` in pre-training corpora. The model's prior on what follows `"answer":` is enormous.

example.title: Currency unit drift
example.before: class Invoice(BaseModel): total: float # is this $19.99 or 1999?
example.reason: Float dollars led the model to alternately emit `19.99` and `1999`. Pinning `total_cents: int` removes the float-vs-int ambiguity AND the cents-vs-dollars one in one move.

example.title: Boolean direction
example.after: class Order(BaseModel): is_paid: bool is_shipped: bool payment_status: Literal["pending", "paid", "refunded"]
example.delta: Downstream code stopped having to consult the description to know what True meant.
example.reason: `flag` requires the reader (and the model) to remember which direction True points. `is_paid` is self-documenting; True/False map directly to the verb.

example.title: neromedia story pipeline
example.before: class Story(BaseModel): text: str output: str score: float
example.after: class Story(BaseModel): body_markdown: str one_line_hook: str relevance_score_0_to_1: float
example.delta: Model stopped putting Markdown in the wrong field; `relevance_score` stopped drifting outside [0,1].
example.reason: Each new name encodes a constraint the previous name did not: format (`_markdown`), purpose (`one_line_hook`), range (`_0_to_1`). The model's hallucinations dropped because the prompt now constrains the shape.

example.title: Triage enum semantics
example.delta: Inter-run consistency on triage rose from 67% to 94%.
example.reason: The cryptic `a|b|c` forced the model to consult the prompt context every time; `low|medium|high|critical` taps a universally-trained domain vocabulary.
